name: superleads
description: Universal foreign-trade online lead research Skill Suite with source evidence, contact intelligence, review gates, and tiered workbook delivery.

interface.longDescription: Superleads is a general-purpose foreign-trade online lead research Skill Suite for discovering, organizing, checking, reviewing, and exporting overseas prospects and sourced contact intelligence without hard-coded industry ICP defaults.
defaultPrompt: Use Superleads to find overseas buyers for my product and target market.
Use Superleads to enrich this customer list with sourced contacts.
Use Superleads to audit these lead sources before delivery.
